criteria.name: Stanhope has station_daily.csv with FWI columns
criteria.evidence: git show HEAD:data/processed/stanhope/station_daily.csv — 1461 rows with ffmc, dmc, dc, isi, bui, fwi columns present.

criteria.name: stanhope_validation.csv exists
criteria.evidence: git show HEAD:data/processed/stanhope_validation.csv — file exists with 5 station rows.

criteria.name: Validation report includes row for each local station
criteria.evidence: Report contains greenwich, cavendish, north_rustico, stanley_bridge, tracadie — all 5 local stations.

criteria.name: Validation report has overlap_days and MAE columns
criteria.evidence: Columns: station, overlap_days, mean_abs_diff_ffmc, mean_abs_diff_dmc, mean_abs_diff_dc, mean_abs_diff_fwi.

criteria.name: Greenwich-Stanhope MAE < 5 for FWI
criteria.evidence: greenwich mean_abs_diff_fwi = 0.0159, well below threshold of 5.

summary: Phase 4 Stanhope Validation: all 5 acceptance criteria pass. Artifact validation PASS (Stanhope hourly 35064 rows, daily 1461 rows). Pre-flight PASS (validate_against_reference and compare_station_data found). All adapters inherit BaseAdapter. Greenwich-Stanhope FWI agreement is excellent (MAE 0.016). Note: stanley_bridge and tracadie have no FWI comparison data (nulls) but still appear in the report with overlap day counts.
